root_text.sn48.39:1.4: Sukhavedaniyaṁ, bhikkhave, phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati sukhindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:1.6: Tasseva sukhavedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ sukhavedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppannaṁ sukhindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti.
root_text.sn48.39:2.1: Dukkhavedaniyaṁ, bhikkhave, phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati dukkhindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:2.3: Tasseva dukkhavedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ dukkhavedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppannaṁ dukkhindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti.
root_text.sn48.39:3.1: Somanassavedaniyaṁ, bhikkhave, phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati somanassindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:3.3: Tasseva somanassavedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ somanassavedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppannaṁ somanassindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti.
root_text.sn48.39:4.1: Domanassavedaniyaṁ, bhikkhave, phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati domanassindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:4.3: Tasseva domanassavedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ domanassavedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppannaṁ domanassindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti.
root_text.sn48.39:5.1: Upekkhāvedaniyaṁ, bhikkhave, phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati upekkhindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:5.3: Tasseva upekkhāvedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ upekkhāvedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppannaṁ upekkhindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti.
root_text.sn48.39:6.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ kaṭṭhānaṁ saṅghaṭṭanasamodhānā usmā jāyati, tejo abhinibbattati; tesaṁyeva kaṭṭhānaṁ nānābhāvāvinikkhepā yā tajjā usmā sā nirujjhati sā vūpasammati;
root_text.sn48.39:6.2: evameva kho, bhikkhave, sukhavedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati sukhindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:6.4: Tasseva sukhavedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ sukhavedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati sukhindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti.
root_text.sn48.39:7.4: upekkhāvedaniyaṁ, bhikkhave, phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati upekkhindriyaṁ.
root_text.sn48.39:7.6: Tasseva upekkhāvedaniyassa phassassa nirodhā ‘yaṁ tajjaṁ vedayitaṁ upekkhāvedaniyaṁ phassaṁ paṭicca uppajjati upekkhindriyaṁ taṁ nirujjhati, taṁ vūpasammatī’ti pajānāti”.

translation_text.sn48.39:0.3: The Simile of the Fire Sticks
translation_text.sn48.39:1.3: The faculties of pleasure, pain, happiness, sadness, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn48.39:1.4: The faculty of pleasure arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as pleasant.
translation_text.sn48.39:1.5: When in a state of pleasure, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of pleasure.’
translation_text.sn48.39:1.6: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as pleasant, you understand that the corresponding faculty of pleasure ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:2.1: The faculty of pain arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as painful.
translation_text.sn48.39:2.2: When in a state of pain, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of pain.’
translation_text.sn48.39:2.3: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as painful, you understand that the corresponding faculty of pain ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:3.1: The faculty of happiness arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as happiness.
translation_text.sn48.39:3.2: When in a state of happiness, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of happiness.’
translation_text.sn48.39:3.3: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as happiness, you understand that the corresponding faculty of happiness ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:4.1: The faculty of sadness arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as sadness.
translation_text.sn48.39:4.2: When in a state of sadness, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of sadness.’
translation_text.sn48.39:4.3: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as sadness, you understand that the corresponding faculty of sadness ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:5.1: The faculty of equanimity arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as equanimous.
translation_text.sn48.39:5.2: When in a state of equanimity, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of equanimity.’
translation_text.sn48.39:5.3: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as equanimous, you understand that the corresponding faculty of equanimity ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:6.1: When you rub two sticks together, heat is generated and fire is produced. But when you part the sticks and lay them aside, any corresponding heat ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:6.2: In the same way, the faculty of pleasure arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as pleasant.
translation_text.sn48.39:6.3: When in a state of pleasure, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of pleasure.’
translation_text.sn48.39:6.4: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as pleasant, you understand that the corresponding faculty of pleasure ceases and stops.
translation_text.sn48.39:7.4: equanimity arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as equanimous.
translation_text.sn48.39:7.5: When in a state of equanimity, you understand: ‘I’m in a state of equanimity.’
translation_text.sn48.39:7.6: With the cessation of that contact to be experienced as equanimous, you understand that the corresponding faculty of equanimity ceases and stops.”

variant_text.sn48.39:6.1: saṅghaṭṭanasamodhānā → saṅghaṭanasamodhānā (sya-all, km); saṅghaṭṭanāsamodhānā (pts1ed, mr) | nānābhāvāvinikkhepā → nānābhāvanikkhepā (sya-all, km, mr); nānābhāvā nikkhepā (pts1ed)
